commands.review_summary:
The PR makes the LLM slug-generator embedded run use `authProfileFailurePolicy: "local"` and adds a focused unit assertion for that option.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +10. Total +13 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for a source-level reproduction: current main runs the slug helper without a local failure policy, and the runner forwards that missing policy to the shared auth-profile failure resolver. I did not rerun the live Anthropic incident in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the auth-provider semantic change and follow-through on the linked issue after merge.
